work_unit: pytest-gate: add test_ wrapper so pytest discovers e2e
situation: GATES.md requires 'pytest 全绿' but tests/test_e2e.py only had a run() function with no test_ prefix — pytest collected 0 items. All projects scored 0.0 in scout-scan; this was the most concrete structural gap across all projects.
action: Added test_stub_e2e() wrapper that asserts run() returns True. pytest now collects 1 test, passes in 2.74s.
outcome_evidence: pytest output: 'collected 1 item ... 1 passed in 2.74s' (before: 'collected 0 items ... no tests ran')
next_suggestion: Add unit tests for temporal.py (deterministic time parser) — GATES.md also asks for '可插拔接口单测' which has no coverage yet; or add test_temporal.py with parse_chinese_number/resolve edge cases
